meta.title: Norwegian Continental Shelf public reference facts
meta.source: norskpetroleum.no (Norwegian Petroleum) and the Norwegian Offshore Directorate (Sodir, formerly NPD) FactPages
meta.license: Content from norskpetroleum.no may be reused with attribution to the source and a link to www.norskpetroleum.no. Sodir FactPages data is open data (attribution requested). No proprietary or confidential data is included.
meta.attribution: Source: Norwegian Petroleum (www.norskpetroleum.no), Norwegian Ministry of Energy and Norwegian Offshore Directorate.
meta.disclaimer: This is a curated public seed snapshot of headline national facts and a qualitative inventory of major fields. Per-field production, reserves, and full annual production time series must be refreshed by ingesting the official Sodir FactPages / norskpetroleum.no quick-download tables. Figures are as published for the stated reference year and may be revised by the sources.
meta.refresh_instructions: Download the official yearly production and field tables from the norskpetroleum.no quick-downloads page or Sodir FactPages CSV exports, then ingest them with NcsDataset.ingest_sodir_production_csv() / NcsDataset.ingest_annual_production().

fields_total_since_1971.note: Fields that have produced oil and/or gas since production started in 1971.

discoveries_under_consideration.note: Discoveries being considered for development at year-end 2025; most are small satellite candidates.

annual_production_oe.note: Total Norwegian production in 2025; more than half of the volume was gas.

export_value.note: Export value of crude oil, natural gas and condensate in 2025 (~57% of Norway's total goods exports).

government_net_cash_flow.note: Government's estimated total net cash flow from petroleum activities in 2026 (taxes, fees, dividend and SDFI).

petroleum_investments.note: Investments in the petroleum sector, about one fifth of total investments in productive capital in Norway in 2024.

gas_pipeline_network_length.note: Total length of the Norwegian gas pipeline network.

petroleum_employment.note: Total employment in the petroleum sector in 2023.

produced_sold_delivered_fraction.note: 56 per cent of total resources have been produced, sold and delivered.

remaining_fraction.note: 44 per cent of total resources remain.

sea_areas.name: North Sea
sea_areas.note: Most mature area of the Norwegian shelf; largest number of producing fields.

sea_areas.name: Norwegian Sea
sea_areas.note: Mix of oil and gas/condensate fields, several with subsea tie-backs.

sea_areas.name: Barents Sea
sea_areas.note: Northernmost area; fewer developments, gas (Snohvit) and oil (Goliat, Johan Castberg).

field_attribute_notes: Field operator and status are a public reference snapshot and can change over time (transfers, cessation of production). Verify current operator, status, and any per-field production/reserves figures against the Sodir FactPages before quantitative use. Per-field recoverable/remaining/produced oil-equivalent volumes are intentionally left unset in this seed (no numbers are invented) and are populated by ingesting the official Sodir field-reserves export via NcsDataset.ingest_sodir_field_reserves_csv().
